column1: DC Power Supply (Mean Well NDR-480-24) – Line Input
column11: Line from wall -> passes through power switch (closed = line passes) -> enters 25A fuse (EURO S10H-5H) -> splits to multiple loads -> enters PSU L terminal

column1: DC Power Supply (Mean Well NDR-480-24) – Neutral Input
column11: Neutral from supply -> directly connected to PSU N terminal

column1: DC Power Supply (Mean Well NDR-480-24) – Ground (Protective Earth)
column11: Protective earth -> connected to PSU ground terminal / chassis bond

column1: DC Power Supply (Mean Well NDR-480-24) – Negative Output
column11: -V from power supply -> connected to A2 (coil return) of contactor

column1: DC Power Supply (Mean Well NDR-480-24) – Negative Output
column11: -V from power supply -> connected to COM of D2-08TD2

column1: DC Power Supply (Mean Well NDR-480-24) – Negative Output
column11: -V from power supply -> connected to COM of D2-08ND3

column1: DC Power Supply (Mean Well NDR-480-24) – Negative Output
column11: -V from power supply -> connected to COM of D2-04RTD

column1: DC Power Supply (Mean Well NDR-480-24) – Positive Output
column11: +24V from power supply -> enters terminal block -> passes through single 1.5A fast blow fuse -> distributed to pushbutton commons (Forward, Reverse, Dead man switch 1, Dead man switch 2)
